title: Recurrent Constellations of Embryonic Malformations ( <scp>RCEM</scp> ): Teratogenicity Linked to Transient Hypoxia and Hormone Pregnancy Tests Agrees With <scp>RCEM</scp> and Suggest a Reactive Oxygen Species Pathogenesis
abstract: This review shows that HPTs are associated with human teratogenicity and ROS to be the proximate teratogen underlying RCEM.
